name: adversarial
description: Edge cases: ambiguous inputs, contradictions, non-tasks that look like tasks, buried tasks in long messages. No pass gate — diagnostic only.

cases.input: I was talking to Sarah at lunch and she mentioned that the new hire starts Monday and we should probably get the onboarding docs updated before then, oh and also I need to pick up diapers on the way home
cases.notes: Two tasks buried in conversational context. Must extract both without treating the entire message as one task.
Not a new task — this is a command to cancel an existing task. Parser should recognize the intent difference.
Not a new task — this is a completion report for an existing task.

cases.input: The meeting went well! Sarah loved the proposal. We celebrated with coffee afterward.
cases.notes: Pure status update with no actionable task. Should not create a task from this.

cases.input: Fix the urgent bug by Friday but don't worry about it, it's not really that important, whenever you get to it is fine
cases.notes: Contradictory signals: 'urgent' + 'by Friday' vs 'not important' + 'whenever'. Later qualifications should override initial framing. Soft deadline, moderate-low priority.
